description_cn: 在给定的迭代次数后引起爆炸。
description_en: Causes an explosion after a given number of iterations

parameters.name: Location
parameters.desc_cn: 该点将成为爆炸的中心。
parameters.desc_en: The point which will be the center of the explosion

parameters.name: Points
parameters.desc_en: The points which will be affected by the explosion

parameters.name: Detonation
parameters.desc_cn: 爆炸发生的求解器迭代
parameters.desc_en: The solver iteration at which the explosion will occur

parameters.name: Reset
parameters.desc_cn: 将其连接到于求解器组件重置输入连接的相同按钮。
parameters.desc_en: Connect this to the same button you have connected to the Solver component reset input

author: Kangaroo Team
